content: Hi all, I’m new here, my name is Aliet Exposito, and I am a Cuban programmer. A couple of days ago, I wrote a comment on the issue: https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/1117 asking if anyone is working on it, as I would be interested in working on those patches. If there is no one assigned to that issue and it is available for me to work on, please let me know if you would be so kind. Best regards, and have an excellent day.

I sent the patches: https://lore.kernel.org/rust-for-linux/20240918225115.2309224-1-aliet.exposito@gmail.com/T/#t
Thank you very much for the opportunity to work on a good first issue
